creative_premise: Afterimage remains an ephemeral audiovisual field; this slice adds a deployment truth boundary so a public copy can be identified without turning the piece into a dashboard or product surface.
completed_slice: Added a provider-neutral static deployment manifest and a fail-closed receipt verifier binding HTTPS URL, immutable source commit, deployment time, manifest bytes, entrypoint bytes, served bytes, and identity markers.

verification.environment: isolated Node runtime using byte-identical proposed module and test content before commit

limits: No public hosting deployment was performed in this run.
